headline: REITs Excel, Earnings Swell, Fed Rebels
summary: U.S. stocks notch a 5th weekly gain as earnings beat, the Fed stays put, and REITs raise FFO guidance amid M&A. Read the full analysis here.

headline: Iron Mountain (IRM) Is Up 9.6% After Raising 2026 Revenue Outlook And Highlighting Growth Segments – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Iron Mountain’s first-quarter 2026 results, reported on April 30, showed revenue rising to US$1.94 billion and net income to US$143.67 million, with earnings per share of US$0.48 from continuing operations and an affirmed quarterly dividend of US$0.864 per share. The company also lifted its full-year 2026 revenue guidance to a range of US$7.83 billion to US$7.93 billion, underscoring strong momentum in higher-growth areas such as data centers, digital solutions, and asset lifecycle...

headline: Assessing Iron Mountain (IRM) Valuation After A Powerful Multi Month Share Price Run
summary: Why Iron Mountain is on investors’ radar Iron Mountain (IRM) has drawn attention after a strong recent run, with the share price up 25.99% over the past month and 38.05% over the past 3 months, prompting fresh interest in its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Iron Mountain. The recent 9.62% 7 day share price return and 52.80% year to date share price return suggest momentum is building on top of an already strong 5 year total shareholder return of 276.69%. If Iron Mountain’s run has...
